commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Scripture says this about the murder of the prophets, whom they killed without hesitation—“slow to do good but swift to murder.” Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: Destruction and misery are in their ways, and the way of peace have they not known. The fear of God is not before their eyes.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
